name: careercopilot-workspace
description: MonWorkspace manager for CareerCopilot AI Full-stack Platform

scripts.setup-backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev-backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000

author: Silicon Valley AI Labs
